headline: Artisan Mid Cap Value Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: Shares of Genpact fell as investors questioned the pace at which the company can translate its investments in AI into meaningful revenue acceleration.

headline: Transcend Launches Policy Engine: Business Rules, Applied at the Speed of AI
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, July 22, 2026--New runtime API unifies business policy, regulatory context, and customer permissions into a single decision layer, now in beta with F500 companies.
